name: @durable-streams/coding-agents
description: Bridge coding agents to durable streams for persistent, shareable sessions
author: Durable Stream contributors

scripts.test: cd ../.. && pnpm exec vitest run --project coding-agents
scripts.test:live: cd ../.. && CODING_AGENTS_RUN_REAL=1 pnpm exec vitest run --project coding-agents packages/coding-agents/test/real-agents.test.ts
scripts.test:live:smoke: cd ../.. && CODING_AGENTS_RUN_REAL=1 pnpm exec vitest run --project coding-agents packages/coding-agents/test/real-agents.test.ts -t "simple prompt round trip|normalization stays stable"
scripts.test:live:smoke:claude: cd ../.. && CODING_AGENTS_RUN_REAL=1 pnpm exec vitest run --project coding-agents packages/coding-agents/test/real-agents.test.ts -t "Claude can complete a simple prompt round trip|Claude normalization stays stable on a live prompt history"
scripts.test:live:smoke:codex: cd ../.. && CODING_AGENTS_RUN_REAL=1 pnpm exec vitest run --project coding-agents packages/coding-agents/test/real-agents.test.ts -t "Codex can complete a simple prompt round trip|Codex normalization stays stable on a live prompt history"
scripts.test:live:claude: cd ../.. && CODING_AGENTS_RUN_REAL=1 pnpm exec vitest run --project coding-agents packages/coding-agents/test/real-agents.test.ts -t "Claude"
scripts.test:live:codex: cd ../.. && CODING_AGENTS_RUN_REAL=1 pnpm exec vitest run --project coding-agents packages/coding-agents/test/real-agents.test.ts -t "Codex"
